title: agalinis tenuifolia var. macrophylla
intro: Agalinis tenuifolia var. macrophylla, also known as tall purple gerardia, is a plant species within the Orobanchaceae family, commonly found in North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agalinis tenuifolia var. macrophylla include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall respiratory health.
